languages.text: "Почти наверняка — ничего хорошего. Обычно именно с задержки поставок начинаются бунты, гражданские войны, саботаж {g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}ксеносов{/g} и другие малоприятные мероприятия". {n}Тон Соломона убийственно серьезен.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Почти наверняка — ничего хорошего. Обычно именно с задержки поставок начинаются бунты, гражданские войны, саботаж {g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}ксеносов{/g} и другие малоприятные мероприятия". {n}Тон Соломона убийственно серьезен.{/n}

languages.text: "Almost certainly nothing good. Delayed shipments often mark the beginning of uprisings, civil wars, {g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}xenos{/g} sabotage, and other undesirable activities." {n}Solomorne's tone is murderously serious.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Почти наверняка — ничего хорошего. Обычно именно с задержки поставок начинаются бунты, гражданские войны, саботаж {g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}ксеносов{/g} и другие малоприятные мероприятия". {n}Тон Соломона убийственно серьезен.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Almost certainly nothing good. Delayed shipments often mark the beginning of uprisings, civil wars, {g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}xenos{/g} sabotage, and other undesirable activities." {n}Solomorne's tone is murderously serious.{/n}
"Almost certainly nothing good. Delayed shipments often mark the beginning of uprisings, civil wars, xenos sabotage, and other undesirable activities." {n}Solomorne's tone is murderously serious.{/n}
"Almost certainly nothing good. Delayed shipments often mark the beginning of uprisings, civil wars, xenos sabotage, and other undesirable activities." {n}Solomorne's tone is murderously serious.{/n}

languages.text: 「ほとんど確実に良いことではない。遅延した出荷は、反乱、内戦、異種族の妨害行為など、望ましくない活動の始まりを告げることが多いのだ。」{n}ソロモーンの口調は殺意に満ちている.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Almost certainly nothing good. Delayed shipments often mark the beginning of uprisings, civil wars, xenos sabotage, and other undesirable activities." {n}Solomorne's tone is murderously serious.{/n}

traits.locale_text: 「ほとんど確実に良いことではない。遅延した出荷は、反乱、内戦、異種族の妨害行為など、望ましくない活動の始まりを告げることが多いのだ。」{n}ソロモーンの口調は殺意に満ちている.{/n}

languages.text: “绝对不是好兆头。运输延误往往是暴动、内乱、{g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}异形{/g}破坏以及其他不良事件的前兆。”{n}索罗蒙的语气肃杀得令人窒息。{/n}
languages.original_text: "Almost certainly nothing good. Delayed shipments often mark the beginning of uprisings, civil wars, {g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}xenos{/g} sabotage, and other undesirable activities." {n}Solomorne's tone is murderously serious.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “绝对不是好兆头。运输延误往往是暴动、内乱、异形破坏以及其他不良事件的前兆。”{n}索罗蒙的语气肃杀得令人窒息。{/n}

languages.text: «Nada bueno, eso es prácticamente seguro. Los envíos con retraso suelen señalar el comienzo de revueltas, guerras civiles, sabotaje {g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}xenos{/g} y otras actividades indeseables». {n}El tono de Solomorne adopta una seriedad absoluta.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Almost certainly nothing good. Delayed shipments often mark the beginning of uprisings, civil wars, {g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}xenos{/g} sabotage, and other undesirable activities." {n}Solomorne's tone is murderously serious.{/n}

traits.locale_text: «Nada bueno, eso es prácticamente seguro. Los envíos con retraso suelen señalar el comienzo de revueltas, guerras civiles, sabotaje xenos y otras actividades indeseables». {n}El tono de Solomorne adopta una seriedad absoluta.{/n}

languages.text: "Fast sicher nichts Gutes. Verspätete Lieferungen markieren oft den Beginn von Aufständen, Bürgerkriegen, Sabotageakten von {g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}Xenos{/g} und anderen unerwünschten Aktivitäten." {n}Solomorne spricht mit einem mörderischen Ernst.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Almost certainly nothing good. Delayed shipments often mark the beginning of uprisings, civil wars, {g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}xenos{/g} sabotage, and other undesirable activities." {n}Solomorne's tone is murderously serious.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Fast sicher nichts Gutes. Verspätete Lieferungen markieren oft den Beginn von Aufständen, Bürgerkriegen, Sabotageakten von Xenos und anderen unerwünschten Aktivitäten. {n}Solomorne spricht mit einem mörderischen Ernst.{/n}

languages.text: « Sûrement rien de bon. Les retards de livraison marquent souvent le commencement de révoltes, de guerres civiles, de sabotages {g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}xénos{/g} et d'autres activités indésirables, » {n}déclare Solomorne sur un ton dangereusement sérieux.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Almost certainly nothing good. Delayed shipments often mark the beginning of uprisings, civil wars, {g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}xenos{/g} sabotage, and other undesirable activities." {n}Solomorne's tone is murderously serious.{/n}

traits.locale_text: « Sûrement rien de bon. Les retards de livraison marquent souvent le commencement de révoltes, de guerres civiles, de sabotages xénos et d'autres activités indésirables, » {n}déclare Solomorne sur un ton dangereusement sérieux.{/n}

languages.text: "Neredeyse kesinlikle iyi bir şey değil. Gecikmiş sevkiyatlar; genellikle isyanların, iç savaşların, {g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}zeno{/g} sabotajlarının ve diğer istenmeyen faaliyetlerin başlangıcına işaret eder." {n}Solomorne'un ses tonu son derece ciddi.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Almost certainly nothing good. Delayed shipments often mark the beginning of uprisings, civil wars, {g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}xenos{/g} sabotage, and other undesirable activities." {n}Solomorne's tone is murderously serious.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Neredeyse kesinlikle iyi bir şey değil. Gecikmiş sevkiyatlar; genellikle isyanların, iç savaşların, zeno sabotajlarının ve diğer istenmeyen faaliyetlerin başlangıcına işaret eder." {n}Solomorne'un ses tonu son derece ciddi.{/n}
